display_text: Introducing Golden Horizon Pilsner, a crisp and refreshing beer crafted for everyday enjoyment. This classic Pilsner boasts a light golden color and a clean, bright taste. Expect a subtle citrus hop aroma and a balanced bitterness, complemented by a light body and a dry finish. With an ABV of 4.8% and 35 IBUs, it’s perfectly approachable and easy-drinking. Brewed with carefully selected ingredients, including citrus hops, Golden Horizon offers a straightforward and satisfying Pilsner experience. A six-pack is priced at $9.

Introducing Midnight Bloom Stout, a rich and decadent dark beer perfect for savoring. This full-bodied stout boasts a deep, dark color and an ABV of 7.5%. Expect a complex flavor profile with notes of roasted malt complemented by a subtle sweetness and creamy mouthfeel thanks to the addition of lactose. With a moderate bitterness and a pleasant aroma, Midnight Bloom offers a balanced and satisfying experience. It’s a robust and flavorful choice, priced at $14 for a six-pack, ideal for those who appreciate a truly indulgent stout.

Introducing Citrus Burst IPA, a vibrant and refreshing take on a classic style. This IPA boasts a bright golden color and a satisfyingly crisp bitterness (60 IBU) with an ABV of 6.2%. Expect a juicy aroma and flavor driven by prominent citrus hops, balanced by a light body and subtle acidity. With no added sweetness or fruit, this beer delivers a clean and zesty experience. Perfect for those who enjoy a balanced IPA with a burst of citrus character, Citrus Burst is available now for $12 per six-pack.

Introducing Summer Orchard Sour, a refreshing and tart beer perfect for warm weather. This light-bodied Sour boasts a vibrant acidity balanced by subtle sweetness, creating a crisp and enjoyable drinking experience. With a gentle bitterness and a delicate aroma, it’s easy to sip on. Brewed with real fruit additions, this beer offers a unique and fruity twist on the classic Sour style. At 5.0% ABV and 15 IBUs, it’s a delightfully approachable beer, priced at $16 for a six-pack.

Introducing Rustic Field Saison, a refreshing and complex beer perfect for enjoying outdoors. This Saison boasts a light golden color and a subtle malt sweetness balanced by a crisp acidity. Expect a vibrant aroma with citrus hop notes, complemented by a medium-light body and gentle bitterness. Aged in oak barrels, this beer offers a nuanced depth of flavor. With an ABV of 7.0% and 25 IBUs, it’s a flavorful yet approachable choice. Available in a six-pack for $11.

Introducing Sunrise Pilsner, a crisp and refreshing take on a classic style. This Pilsner boasts a light golden color and a clean, bright flavor profile. Subtle citrus hop notes provide a delicate aroma and balanced bitterness, complementing the gentle malt sweetness. With an ABV of 4.8% and 35 IBUs, it’s perfectly sessionable and easy-drinking. Brewed with carefully selected ingredients and no added fruit or roasted malts, Sunrise Pilsner offers a straightforward and satisfying beer experience. Enjoy a 6-pack for just $9.

Introducing Midnight Stout, a rich and full-bodied stout brewed for those who appreciate a deeply satisfying experience. This dark, intensely colored beer boasts a robust roasted malt character, complemented by a subtle sweetness and creamy mouthfeel thanks to the addition of lactose. Expect a complex aroma with a noticeable intensity. With an ABV of 7.5% and 45 IBUs, Midnight Stout delivers a balanced bitterness that enhances the overall flavor profile. Available in a 6-pack for $15, it's the perfect indulgence for a cozy evening.

Introducing Crimson Bloom Sour, a refreshingly tart and vibrant beer. This Sour style ale boasts a beautiful ruby hue and a subtle complexity thanks to the addition of real fruit. With a light body and a crisp, clean finish, it’s perfect for those seeking a balanced and approachable sour experience. Expect a pleasant acidity complemented by delicate aromas. At 3.8% ABV and 10 IBUs, it’s easy-drinking and sessionable. A 6-pack is priced at $12, offering a delightful taste of springtime in every can.

Introducing Golden Harvest Wheat, a refreshing and easy-drinking beer perfect for any occasion. This Wheat style beer boasts a light golden color and a subtle sweetness balanced by a crisp acidity. Expect a gentle bitterness and a pleasant aroma with hints of citrus thanks to carefully selected hops. With an ABV of 5.2% and 20 IBUs, it’s approachable and flavorful. Enjoy this uncomplicated brew, priced at $8 for a six-pack, and experience a taste of sunshine in every sip.

Introducing Emberglow Porter, a rich and full-bodied dark beer perfect for cozy evenings. This Porter boasts a deep, dark color and a robust aroma thanks to carefully selected roasted malts. Expect a balanced flavor profile with subtle sweetness and a gentle bitterness, complemented by a smooth, creamy body. Aged in oak barrels, Emberglow offers a nuanced complexity and a warm, inviting finish. With an ABV of 6.0% and 30 IBUs, it’s a satisfying and approachable brew. A six-pack is priced at $11.
